# Three.js r128 vendored runtime

These files are the exact runtime dependencies previously loaded by
`plot_3d/plot_3d.html` from cdnjs and jsDelivr:

- `three.min.js` — Three.js r128
- `OrbitControls.js` — Three.js r128 example control

Three.js is copyright 2010–2021 Three.js Authors and distributed under the MIT
license. The files are kept in the repository and embedded into the generated
HTML so the deployed tool performs no runtime network request.
